message:
Command `# io.tcl is already in /scripts/openroad/common/ and references SCRIPTS_DIR/openroad/...
# So SCRIPTS_DIR must be the parent of "openroad/" - i.e. /scripts/
# Let's check what _env.tcl sets for SCRIPTS_DIR
grep "SCRIPTS_DIR" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/_env.tcl | head -3` executed with exit code 0.
